heading: FAILURE TO PROVIDE SECURITY: LOSS OF PERMIT
operative_text: If a person fails to provide security under this subchapter as provided by Section 151.251(b) of this code, the comptroller shall revoke or suspend the permit or retailer's registration of the person as provided by Section 151.203 of this code.
_note: No defined terms present in this section. Cross-reference citations normalized to canonical form.
